Ntc And Second Motion To Compel Release Of Medical Records And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. August Gugelmann of Swanson & McNamara (415-477-3800) appearing for defendant.
Atty. David G. Yen of The Cartwright Law Firm Inc. (415-433-0444) appearing for plaintiff.

Argued - DEFENDANT JAMES MALCOLMSON's Motion To Compel Release Of Medical Records And For Sanctions is granted production of Stanford records subject to confidentiality agreement, denied of sanctions. Parties signed the stipulation to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. Prevailing party prepare order. Robert Kane Judge Pro Tem, not reported. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2011 Continued To Jun-11-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2011 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn To Enforce Subpoena Duces Tecum; Sep. Statement
Off Calendar Nov-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
August Gugelmann, Esq., from Swanson & McNamara, 415-477-3800, for defendant and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT JAMES MALCOLMSON'S Motion To Enforce Subpoena Duces Tecum is Granted. Third party La Case de las Madres must produce all responsive documents no later than December 16, 2011. Names and any other identifying information of all victims or alleged victims of domestic violence other than plaintiff should be redacted from the documents that are produced. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Set For Trial On Jan-30-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-13-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 502
